name: Oatmeal Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar together until smooth.
2. Add the cinnamon, cloves, and salt to the mixture; stir in the corn syrup.
3. Beat in the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
4. Stir in the rolled oats.
5. Pour the filling into the prepared pastry shell.
6. Bake at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for about 1 hour, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. If desired, use the filling to make tarts.
